title: Pan-Seared Cod with Crunchy Crumb Topping
description: A simple and flavorful Portuguese-inspired dish featuring cod, a crunchy crumb topping, and a hint of skillet-seared goodness.
instructions: Rinse the cod fillets under cold water and pat them dry with a paper towel.
In a pan, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the cod fillets to the pan and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, mix the Portuguese bread crumbs, crumbly cheese, and a pinch of salt and pepper in a small bowl.
Sprinkle the crumb mixture evenly over the cooked cod fillets.
Increase the heat to medium-high and add another tablespoon of olive oil to the pan.
Add the skillet to the pan and pan-fry the crumb topping until golden brown and crispy.
Serve the cod fillets hot, garnished with lemon wedges and a side of your favorite vegetables.
